---
title: "Analysis of COVID data"
author: "Marta Mainetti"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: show
    code-tools: true
    df-print: paged
---


# Import libraries and prepare setting

```{r, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(medicaldata)
library(skimr)
library(unibeCols)
```

# Load data

```{r}
covid_testing_raw <- medicaldata::covid_testing
```

```{r}
covid_testing <- covid_testing_raw %>% 
  mutate(subject_id = as.character(subject_id)) %>% 
  filter(result != "invalid" & age < 25)

head(covid_testing)
```


# Preliminary analysis

```{r}
skim_without_charts(covid_testing)
table(covid_testing$result)
```


# Data visualization

```{r}
ggplot(data = covid_testing, aes(x = age, y = result)) +
  geom_boxplot()
```


```{r}
ggplot(data = covid_testing, aes(x = pan_day, y = age, col = result)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(x = "Days after start of pandemic", y = "Age", 
       col = "Test result")
```


# Conclusion
